Build a complete Python implementation of a serverless function runtime that executes Python functions in isolated subprocess sandboxes, enforces memory and CPU time limits using cgroups, streams logs in real time, and returns results via a REST API.

Write a full Go implementation of a distributed metadata store for a data lake that tracks dataset schemas, partitions, statistics, and lineage, provides a Hive Metastore-compatible API, and replicates metadata across multiple regions.

Implement a complete TypeScript implementation of a real-time code execution platform where users submit code snippets, code is executed in secure Docker containers, output is streamed back via WebSocket, and execution history is stored per user.

Build a Python script that performs automated generation of Terraform modules from existing AWS infrastructure by querying the AWS API, inferring resource relationships, and producing parameterized Terraform HCL with documentation.

Write a complete Node.js implementation of an intelligent cache warming system that analyzes production traffic patterns, predicts which cache entries will be needed, proactively loads them before expiration, and measures hit rate improvement.

Implement a full Go implementation of a distributed tracing-based performance analysis tool that identifies latency hotspots across microservices, correlates trace data with infrastructure metrics, and generates optimization recommendations.

Build a complete Python implementation of a multi-model machine learning serving platform that supports A/B testing between model versions, shadow scoring for validation, canary deployments with automatic rollback, and per-model latency tracking.

Write a TypeScript implementation of a type-safe database migration framework where migrations are expressed as TypeScript code, the framework validates that each migration is reversible, and applies them transactionally with rollback on error.

Implement a Python script that performs automated extraction and documentation of implicit API contracts between microservices by analyzing service interaction logs and generating formal interface specifications.

Build a complete Go implementation of a real-time collaborative text editor backend using the Conflict-free Replicated Data Type approach for character-level editing, with persistent document history and multi-device synchronization.

Write a full Python implementation of a distributed rate limiting system using the leaky bucket algorithm where each user has a virtual bucket that leaks at a constant rate, implemented with atomic operations on shared memory.

Implement a complete Node.js implementation of a smart API proxy that learns normal request patterns, detects anomalies in real time, blocks suspicious requests, and adapts its detection thresholds based on feedback.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a reactive form engine that evaluates conditional visibility rules, cascading field validations, cross-field computations, and async data loading expressed as a declarative JSON schema.

Write a Python class that implements a complete Merkle tree data structure used for efficient content-addressed storage, with proof generation for specific leaves, proof verification, and incremental updates without full tree reconstruction.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a service that orchestrates blue-green deployments by managing two identical production environments, switching traffic between them atomically, and monitoring rollout health metrics.

Build a Python script that performs automated analysis of a codebase's test coverage blindspots by correlating production error logs with source code locations, identifying frequently erroring untested code paths.

Write a full TypeScript implementation of a distributed locking library using Redis that supports fair queuing of lock waiters, lock promotion from read to write, deadlock detection, and automatic lock release on process crash.

Implement a Python class that provides a complete implementation of a write-optimized data store using a log-structured merge tree with leveled compaction, bloom filters per SSTable, and a concurrent memtable with skip list indexing.

Build a complete Go implementation of a service that monitors and enforces data retention policies across multiple databases by identifying expired data, archiving it to cold storage, and purging it from production systems.

Write a Node.js implementation of a multi-datacenter job queue that schedules jobs to run in a specific region, handles datacenter failover by migrating pending jobs, and ensures at-least-once execution with deduplication.

Implement a full Python implementation of a graph neural network from scratch that supports message passing between nodes, aggregation functions, graph-level pooling, and training on node classification tasks.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a headless content management system with a plugin architecture for custom field types, a query language for content retrieval, versioned content with draft and publish states, and webhook notifications on content changes.

Write a Python script that performs automated profiling and optimization of Python startup time by measuring import costs, identifying slow module initializations, and generating recommendations for deferred loading.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a real-time leaderboard system for a multiplayer game that processes score updates as events, computes global and friend-scoped rankings using Redis sorted sets, and pushes rank changes via WebSocket.

Build a Python class that implements a distributed circuit breaker using a gossip protocol where failure information is propagated across all service instances, allowing coordinated circuit opening without a central coordinator.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a data quality monitoring system that profiles incoming data streams for statistical anomalies, schema violations, and referential integrity errors, generating quality score reports per dataset.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a micro-ORM that uses TypeScript decorators to define entity mappings, generates typed query builders, manages database transactions, and supports optimistic locking with version columns.

Build a Python script that performs automated analysis of inter-service communication to detect synchronous call chains that could be replaced with asynchronous messaging, estimating the latency improvement of each refactoring.

Write a complete Go implementation of a distributed snapshot isolation engine that assigns read timestamps to transactions, maintains a version history of data items, and performs garbage collection of obsolete versions.

Implement a full Python implementation of a streaming data deduplication system that identifies duplicate records across an infinite stream using probabilistic data structures, handles near-duplicates with fuzzy matching.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a code generation framework where output code is defined using a typed AST, transformations are applied as composable functions, and the framework ensures generated code is syntactically valid.

Write a Python class that provides a distributed work queue with geographic routing where jobs are routed to the worker node closest to the data they need to process, minimizing data transfer latency.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a network topology optimizer that analyzes latency and bandwidth between nodes in a cluster, recommends optimal placement for stateful services, and reconfigures routing tables.

Build a Python script that performs automated generation of database query plans by analyzing schema statistics, table sizes, and index selectivity, selecting the optimal join order and access paths for complex queries.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a real-time collaborative API testing tool where teams share API collections, run tests simultaneously, see each other's results in real time, and track API health over time.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a visual component library builder that takes component definitions with variants and states, generates Storybook stories, produces a static documentation site, and exports design tokens.

Build a Python class that implements a distributed map-reduce job tracker that monitors job progress across worker nodes, handles straggler tasks by launching speculative executions, and provides a real-time progress API.

Write a complete Go implementation of a secrets scanning service that monitors Git repository pushes, scans diffs for accidentally committed secrets using pattern matching and entropy analysis, and blocks pushes containing secrets.

Implement a full Python implementation of a packet-based network simulator with configurable topologies, link failure simulation, routing protocol simulation using distance vector, and end-to-end latency measurement.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a real-time collaborative mind mapping tool where multiple users can create, move, and connect nodes simultaneously, with changes synchronized via WebSocket using operational transformation.

Write a Python script that performs automated generation of database sharding strategies by analyzing data access patterns, identifying hot partitions, and recommending shard keys that distribute load evenly.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a service that continuously validates the consistency of distributed data stores by running sampling-based consistency checks and reporting divergence between replicas.

Build a Python class that provides a reactive stream processor that applies complex event processing patterns to detect multi-event sequences, temporal patterns, and threshold crossings across correlated event streams.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a distributed job deduplication service that uses content hashing to identify semantically identical jobs, coalesces duplicate submissions, and returns a shared result to all submitters.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a type-safe HTTP client generator that takes an OpenAPI specification and generates a strongly typed client library with request validation, response typing, and error handling.

Build a Python script that performs automated detection of data skew in distributed SQL queries by analyzing query execution statistics, identifying hot partitions, and suggesting repartitioning strategies.

Write a complete Go implementation of a dynamic service discovery system that uses a gossip-based protocol for service registration, maintains an eventually consistent view of available services, and provides a local cache for fast lookups.
Implement a full Python implementation of a program synthesis system that generates Python functions from input-output examples using a combination of enumeration and constraint solving.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a distributed caching layer for a GraphQL server that caches resolver results at field level, invalidates cached fields when underlying data changes, and provides per-field TTL configuration.

Write a Python class that implements a concurrent skip list supporting lock-free concurrent reads and locked writes, providing O(log n) average time complexity for insert, delete, and search operations.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a real-time event correlation engine that matches incoming events against a library of event patterns, detects complex incidents from simple event sequences, and triggers automated responses.

Build a Python script that performs automated code modernization of Python 2 codebases by parsing the AST, applying Python 3 migration transforms, handling print statements, unicode strings, and integer division changes.

Write a full Node.js implementation of an intelligent test result analyzer that identifies flaky tests, correlates test failures with recent code changes, predicts likely root causes, and prioritizes failures for developer attention.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a reactive state synchronization library that keeps state consistent between browser tabs using the BroadcastChannel API, handles tab crashes, and elects a leader tab for server communication.

Build a Python class that provides a distributed event-driven data pipeline where pipeline stages are registered as event handlers, data flows through the pipeline as events, and the framework manages backpressure.

Write a complete Go implementation of a real-time supply chain visibility platform that ingests shipment events from multiple logistics providers, normalizes them into a unified tracking model, and provides a REST API for shipment status.

Implement a full Python implementation of an automated feature engineering system that generates features from raw data by applying transformations, computing aggregations, and evaluating feature importance for downstream ML models.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a distributed transaction manager that coordinates ACID transactions across multiple microservices using the saga pattern with compensation, ensuring eventual consistency.

Write a Python script that performs automated detection of hard-coded credentials in source code by scanning files using entropy analysis and pattern matching, with support for custom secret patterns and whitelist rules.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a service that monitors database connection pool health, detects connection leaks, measures pool utilization over time, and automatically adjusts pool size based on demand.

Build a Python class that implements a complete virtual machine for a dynamically-typed language with a mark-and-sweep garbage collector, support for closures and higher-order functions, and an interactive REPL.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a distributed API load tester that coordinates multiple test agents to generate high concurrency, measures tail latencies, detects bottlenecks, and generates a detailed performance report.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a schema evolution manager for event-driven systems that validates that new event schema versions are backward and forward compatible with existing consumers and producers.

Build a Python script that performs automated discovery of microservice boundaries in a monolith by analyzing database table access patterns, identifying transaction boundaries, and suggesting service extraction opportunities.

Write a complete Go implementation of a traffic replay tool that captures live HTTP traffic, stores request sequences, replays them against a new service version, compares responses, and reports behavioral differences.

Implement a full Python implementation of a distributed search engine that crawls a set of seed URLs, indexes page content using TF-IDF, stores the index in a distributed key-value store, and serves search queries via a REST API.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a test data factory library where data models are defined with constraints, the factory generates random valid instances respecting all constraints, and supports custom generation strategies.

Write a Python class that provides a streaming aggregation engine that processes high-volume event streams, maintains running aggregates in memory using approximate algorithms, and flushes results to a time-series database periodically.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a distributed message deduplication system that assigns unique IDs to messages, detects and discards duplicates within a configurable window, using a distributed Bloom filter.

Build a Python script that performs automated analysis of service level objective compliance by analyzing latency, error rate, and availability metrics against SLO targets and generating error budget burn rate reports.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a multi-tenant analytics pipeline that ingests events from tenant applications, applies per-tenant transformation rules, aggregates metrics, and serves dashboards via a GraphQL API.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a reactive observability library that instruments function calls to track execution time, error rates, and call graphs, and exposes metrics via a Prometheus-compatible endpoint.
Build a Python class that implements a distributed two-phase locking protocol for managing concurrent access to shared resources across multiple nodes, with deadlock detection using a wait-for graph.

Write a complete Go implementation of a high-performance HTTP router that uses a radix tree for URL pattern matching, supports parameterized routes and wildcards, measures route matching latency, and provides a middleware chain.

Implement a full Python implementation of an automated API versioning system that detects breaking changes in Python API signatures, generates backward-compatible shims, and manages deprecation warnings over multiple versions.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a distributed tracing visualization tool that parses Zipkin-format trace data, reconstructs service dependency graphs, identifies critical paths, and renders interactive flamegraphs.

Write a Python script that performs automated generation of mock servers for third-party APIs by recording real API responses, generating response schemas, and producing a configurable mock server with realistic response variation.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a service that automates SSL certificate management by monitoring certificate expiry dates, requesting renewals via ACME protocol, and deploying updated certificates to servers.
Build a Python class that provides a distributed time window aggregation service that computes statistics over rolling time windows across multiple data partitions, with sub-second window resolution.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a smart notification routing system that decides whether to deliver notifications via push, email, or SMS based on user preferences, notification urgency, and user activity patterns.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a compile-time resource management library for TypeScript that tracks resource acquisition and release at the type level, detecting potential resource leaks at compile time.

Build a Python script that performs automated generation of database access layer code from SQL query files by parsing SQL, inferring parameter types from usage context, and generating type-safe Python query functions.

Write a complete Go implementation of a distributed workflow orchestration system where workflows are defined as YAML, steps can run in parallel or sequence, and the system manages retry logic, timeouts, and step outputs.
Implement a full Python implementation of a data catalog with automated schema inference, data profiling, relationship discovery between datasets, search, and a REST API for catalog management.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a zero-copy data sharing library that passes typed data between web workers using SharedArrayBuffer, with atomic operations for synchronization and a message-passing API for coordination.

Write a Python class that implements a distributed time series anomaly detection system that trains separate models per metric, detects anomalies using ensemble methods, correlates anomalies across metrics to identify root causes.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a smart API gateway that learns endpoint response time distributions, detects latency regressions in real time, and automatically increases timeout budgets for slow endpoints.

Build a Python script that performs automated security hardening of Kubernetes deployments by scanning pod specs for security misconfigurations, generating remediation patches, and validating compliance after changes.
Write a full Node.js implementation of a distributed pub/sub system with schema-enforced topics where message payloads are validated against registered Avro schemas before publication.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a reactive data fetching library that normalizes API responses into a flat store, tracks entity relationships, and automatically refetches stale data based on configurable staleness policies.

Build a Python class that provides a distributed bloom filter federation service where multiple services contribute their local Bloom filters, and the federation answers membership queries across all services simultaneously.

Write a complete Go implementation of a service mesh policy enforcer that reads authorization policies from a central store, evaluates them for each inter-service request, and enforces allow or deny decisions with audit logging.

Implement a full Python implementation of a multi-region active-passive failover controller that monitors primary region health, triggers failover by updating DNS records, promotes standby databases, and notifies dependent services.

Build a TypeScript implementation of a live code reloading system for a backend Node.js application that detects file changes, recompiles TypeScript, hot-swaps module exports without restarting the process, and preserves in-flight requests.

Write a Python script that performs automated generation of comprehensive system architecture documentation from code by analyzing service communication, database schemas, external dependencies, and deployment configurations.

Implement a complete Go implementation of a request mirroring service that duplicates incoming traffic to multiple downstream services in real time for shadow testing, comparing responses and logging discrepancies.

Build a Python class that implements a streaming SQL query executor that processes continuous queries over event streams with windowed joins, sliding aggregations, and exactly-once output using watermarks and checkpoints.

Write a full Node.js implementation of a real-time collaborative data modeling tool where teams jointly design database schemas with live conflict resolution, schema validation, and automatic migration script generation.

Implement a TypeScript implementation of a pluggable authentication middleware framework that supports JWT, API keys, OAuth 2.0, and SAML 2.0 authentication strategies with a unified interface for custom strategy plugins.

Build a Python script that performs automated generation of chaos engineering game days by analyzing system architecture, selecting failure scenarios ranked by business impact, and generating runbooks with expected outcomes and recovery procedures.
